mechanism_narrative: A negative 3-month trend in FEDFUNDS lowers the discount rate applied to future earnings and supports higher equity valuation multiples, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 3.64 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward returns following negative 3-month FEDFUNDS trends are not higher than unconditional returns over rolling 3-year windows, or if Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 3.5%, restrictive short rates raise equity discount rates and financing costs, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 3.64 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations with FEDFUNDS above 3.5% produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or have mean returns above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in RSAFS signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value was 757085.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS trends fail to predict above-median 20-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE paired with weakening PAYEMS signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3pp in 3 months and PAYEMS 3-month growth slows
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
series:PAYEMS
fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value was 4.3 as of t-1mo
fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value was 158736 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered labor-deterioration observations produce negative 20-day returns in less than 50% of cases or if the interaction term adds no predictive power versus single-series models.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO combined with slowing CPIAUCSL inflation signals improving real output without cost-pressure acceleration, supporting profit margins and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month growth > 0 and CPIAUCSL 3-month growth decelerates
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
series:CPIAUCSL
fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value was 102.4963 as of t-1mo
fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value was 332.407 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not generate positive average 60-day returns or if an interaction model fails to outperform separate INDPRO and CPIAUCSL signals out of sample.

mechanism_narrative: A downward crossing in HOUST below 1400 signals weakening interest-sensitive construction demand and a future drag on cyclicals, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:HOUST latest snapshot value was 1502.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside crossings below 1400 are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPIAUCSL while FEDFUNDS remains above 3.5% signals persistent inflation under restrictive policy, raising real-economy stress and discount-rate uncertainty, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value was 332.407 as of t-1mo
fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 3.64 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint inflation-plus-restrictive-rate trigger has nonnegative mean 20-day forward returns or if CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS interaction coefficients are insignificant out of sample.

mechanism_narrative: A low or falling UNRATE with positive PAYEMS growth signals stable household income and reduced near-term recession probability, improving risk appetite and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
series:PAYEMS
fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value was 4.3 as of t-1mo
fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value was 158736 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations fail to produce positive 5-day S&P 500 returns more often than the unconditional hit rate or if rolling 2-year hit-rate lift is below 2 percentage points.
